prompt: Soften the eyebrows, close the lip into a smile, and warm the skin tone slightly and change the bubble so it would say 'WOW!'.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Modify the character's face by softening the eyebrows and changing the wide-open mouth into a closed smile. Slightly warm the existing green skin tone of the character. In the speech bubble at the top-left of the image, replace all current text with the word 'WOW!'.
objects: Character with warmer green skin tone
Character's face with a closed smile
Original text in speech bubble (should not be present)
